sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89546" key="proskataskeuastiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσκατα-σκευαστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n89546.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">proving in addition</tr_>, ib. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg004:750:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">750.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
